# UX Checklist: Provide Basic Property Details for More Accurate Estimate

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for attribute-based estimates.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/006-property-details-estimate/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-visible outcomes specified for success, partial-attributes success, reduced-accuracy warning, validation failure, and normalization failure? [Completeness, Spec §Main Flow, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for the attributes-incorporated indicator on success? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for partial-attributes indication when only some attributes are used? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are validation error messages specific enough for size vs beds/baths failures? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are reduced-accuracy warning requirements clearly specified for partial data cases? [Clarity, Spec §Alternate Flows]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do functional requirements and acceptance scenarios align on incorporation indicators and warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK007 Are accessibility requirements defined for validation errors and indicators in the UI? [Gap] Note: Necessary (constitution UX consistency); /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
